mechanics.excerpt: In ay case_ the drive must exists in spite of the Liaos best efforts The state has never adopted formal religion and only interferes directly when reli: gious disputes threaten the state In such cases_ state retalia tion swift and merciless For centuries however, House Liao has worked indirectly to replace formal religious beliets with state approved philosophies specifically the Korvin Doctrine the Sarna Mandate and the Lorix Order, which promote the Confederation'$ attempts expand uphold the ultimate authority of the Chancellor and the state and provide the dic tums requiring all citizens to support both of the above_ Among tne government'$ tools for encouraging" these philosophies are philosophical examinations ad courts of inquiry for those deemed hold questionable beliefs_ As long as Capellan citi- zens maintain respect tor the state , however; they may worship as tney see fit.
